name: Type 'n' Fish
short_description: Welcome to Type 'n' Fish, a cozy indie game where your typing skills become your fishing rod. Cast your line into tranquil waters and type your way to catching a variety of unique fish, each with its own educational description.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Type 'n' Fish, a cozy indie game where your typing skills become your fishing rod. Cast your line into tranquil waters and type your way to catching a variety of unique fish, each with its own educational description. Start off with simple words and phrases, but as you dive deeper, the challenges grow—testing your speed, accuracy, and focus.

This isn’t just a game about fishing; it’s about the joy of discovery, the satisfaction of improving your typing, and the thrill of reeling in something unexpected. With its charming pixel art fishes, relaxing soundtrack, and a world full of personality, Type 'n' Fish is designed to be a comforting escape for casual gamers and typing enthusiasts alike.

But beware—the deeper you go, the more the ocean tests your skills. Can you master the waters and uncover all the secrets hidden beneath the surface?

Key Features:

  • A unique blend of typing and fishing in a relaxing, indie-style package.

  • Progressive challenges that keep you hooked as you improve.

  • A variety of fish with charming descriptions and personalities.

  • Perfect for unwinding after a long day or sharpening your typing skills.

Whether you're here to relax or rise to the challenge, Type 'n' Fish offers a heartfelt experience that’s as rewarding as it is delightful. Grab your keyboard, cast your line, and see what lies beneath the waves.
